description: Commercial Gravity Score: G = wB*B + wP*P + wX*X + wV*V + wR*(100-R). Proof is retained for explainability but de-weighted — on-field winning impact lives in value_score (win_impact). Positive weights sum to 1.0.

global_default.rationale: Gravity = commercial/market value. Brand + Proximity dominate; Velocity captures momentum pricing; Proof is explanatory only (5%); Risk is a light availability discount. Winning impact is value_score.

cfb.rationale: CFB NIL is reach- and market-heavy; Proof demoted to quality/value_score.

ncaa_baseball.rationale: NIL immature — brand/velocity carry commercial G; draft stock stays in value_score.

nfl.rationale: Contract proximity + national brand; Proof demoted (value_score = win impact).

nba.rationale: Global brand + endorsement market; commercial Gravity.

wnba.rationale: Brand-led commercial Gravity; smaller market vs NBA.
